title: Prompt IR v1
description: Pragmatic intermediate representation of a prompt: typed, verbatim segments. Segmentation, not parsing. See CONTRACT.md.

id.description: Segment id, unique within the IR.

kind.description: Closed enum in v1; 'other' is the catch-all.

text.description: MUST be a verbatim substring of the source prompt (enforced by verify, not by schema).

note.description: Optional analyst commentary about this segment.

unsegmented_remainder.description: True when parts of the prompt were intentionally left unsegmented. Full tiling is not required.
